mcp_servers.name: atlassian-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official Atlassian Rovo (Remote) MCP server for Jira, Confluence and Compass

mcp_servers.name: zendesk-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Self-built read-only Zendesk MCP server (search + fetch tickets) for the vaultre-copilot-bot. Subdomain proptech-group; Basic email/token auth.

mcp_servers.name: elastic-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Self-built read-only Elasticsearch MCP server (search logs + list indices, filebeat-* indices) for the vaultre-copilot-bot. ApiKey auth; gated by SSM mcp-elastic-enabled + elastic-url + elastic-api-key.

mcp_servers.name: github-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Official GitHub remote MCP server (read-only endpoint) for the vaultre-copilot-bot code-review mode — fetches PR context (description, reviews, comments, linked issues). Bearer PAT auth; gated by SSM mcp-github-enabled + github-mcp-token.
